---
title: Publications
description: "Peer-reviewed publications by Dr Justin C Yang and the MINDSET research programme, spanning psychiatric epidemiology, causal inference, substance use, and mental health data science."

output:
  html_document:
    keep_md: yes
---
Dr Yang's publications span psychiatric epidemiology, causal inference, substance use, and mental health data science. For a complete record, see his [Google Scholar profile](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=o-MsbBYAAAAJ).

```{r include = FALSE, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(rorcid)
library(rcrossref)
library(tidyverse)

orcid_id <- "0000-0003-2881-4906"

w <- works(orcid_id)

extract_doi <- function(ext_id_df) {
  if (is.null(ext_id_df) || nrow(ext_id_df) == 0) return(NA_character_)
  doi_row <- ext_id_df[ext_id_df$`external-id-type` %in% c("doi", "DOI"), ]
  if (nrow(doi_row) == 0) return(NA_character_)
  doi_row$`external-id-value`[1]
}

normalise_title <- function(x) {
  x %>%
    str_to_lower() %>%
    str_replace_all("[[:punct:]]", " ") %>%
    str_squish()
}

df <- tibble(
  put_code  = w$`put-code`,
  title     = w$`title.title.value`,
  year      = as.integer(w$`publication-date.year.value`),
  journal   = w$`journal-title.value`,
  doi       = map_chr(w$`external-ids.external-id`, extract_doi),
  work_type = w$type
) %>%
  mutate(
    title_key = normalise_title(title),
    is_preprint = work_type %in% c("preprint", "posted-content", "working-paper", "dissertation-thesis"),
    has_doi = !is.na(doi)
  ) %>%
  arrange(title_key, is_preprint, desc(has_doi), desc(year)) %>%
  distinct(title_key, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  distinct(doi, .keep_all = TRUE)

with_doi <- df %>% filter(!is.na(doi))
no_doi   <- df %>% filter(is.na(doi))

cr_cites <- with_doi %>%
  mutate(
    citation = map_chr(doi, function(d) {
      tryCatch(
        cr_cn(dois = d, format = "text"),
        error = function(e) NA_character_
      )
    })
  )

fallback <- bind_rows(
  no_doi,
  cr_cites %>% filter(is.na(citation)) %>% select(-citation)
) %>%
  mutate(
    citation = str_trim(paste0(
      title,
      ifelse(is.na(journal) | journal == "", "", paste0(". *", journal, "*")),
      ifelse(is.na(year), "", paste0(" (", year, ")."))
    ))
  )

publications <- bind_rows(
  cr_cites %>% filter(!is.na(citation)),
  fallback
) %>%
  distinct(put_code, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    citation = if_else(str_detect(citation, "\\.$"), citation, paste0(citation, "."))
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(year)) %>%
  split(.$year) %>%
  rev() %>%
  map(function(x) tibble(value = x$citation)) %>%
  bind_rows()
```
```{r results = 'asis', echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
cat(paste0(publications$value), sep = "\r  \n")
```
